seo.title: Building AI Coding Assistant with LlamaIndex + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai coding assistant with LlamaIndex + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Coding Assistant with LlamaIndex enables code-aware LLMs to index repositories, retrieve relevant code context, and generate solutions with sandbox execution. However, failure modes like irrelevant retrievals, hallucinations beyond source docs, index staleness, and chunk boundary errors can lead to incorrect or insecure code suggestions. Vex guardrails ensure code correctness, security, and compliance by verifying outputs against these risks.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Coding Assistant Architecture with LlamaIndex
architectureOverview.description:
The architecture starts with LlamaIndex ingesting a code repository into a vector store index, enabling semantic search over files, functions, and docs. A query engine retrieves relevant code chunks based on user requests like 'fix this bug' or 'implement feature X', which are passed to an LLM synthesizer for response generation. The agent then executes generated code in a sandbox, validates against tests, and iterates with debugging prompts using updated retrievals.

Key components include document loaders for git repos, embedding models for code semantics, retrievers for top-k chunks, and routers for tool selection (execution, testing). This creates a feedback loop where retrieval quality directly impacts code accuracy and safety.

risks.name: Irrelevant Code Retrieval
risks.description: Query engine returns code chunks unrelated to the debugging task, leading to incorrect fixes
risks.mitigation: Vex verifies semantic relevance between retrieved context and query intent

risks.name: Hallucinated Code Beyond Sources
risks.description: Synthesizer generates code patterns not present in indexed repository
risks.mitigation: Vex traces all generated code back to verified source documents

risks.name: Security Vulnerabilities in Generated Code
risks.description: Assistant suggests code with injection flaws, unsafe deserialization, or command execution
risks.mitigation: Vex scans for OWASP Top 10 patterns and insecure dependencies

risks.name: Credential Leakage in Responses
risks.description: Retrieved context contains API keys or secrets exposed in code comments
risks.mitigation: Vex redacts and blocks PII/credentials before response delivery

implementation.title: Repository Indexing with LlamaIndex
implementation.description: Load and index code repository for semantic search using code-aware embeddings
implementation.code:
from llama_index.core import VectorStoreIndex, SimpleDirectoryReader
from llama_index.embeddings.openai import OpenAIEmbedding

documents = SimpleDirectoryReader("./my-repo").load_data()
embed_model = OpenAIEmbedding(model="text-embedding-3-small")
index = VectorStoreIndex.from_documents(
    documents, 
    embed_model=embed_model
)
query_engine = index.as_query_engine(similarity_top_k=5)

# Persist for production
index.storage_context.persist(persist_dir="./storage")

implementation.title: Query Engine with Code Retrieval
implementation.description: Create query engine that retrieves relevant code context for coding tasks
implementation.code:
from llama_index.core import load_index_from_storage
import os

storage_context = StorageContext.from_defaults(persist_dir="./storage")
index = load_index_from_storage(storage_context)

query_engine = index.as_query_engine(
    similarity_top_k=8,
    node_parser=SentenceSplitter(chunk_size=1024, chunk_overlap=200)
)

response = query_engine.query("Fix the authentication bug in user_login.py")
print(response)

implementation.title: TypeScript LlamaIndex Query Setup
implementation.description: Node.js setup for LlamaIndex with code repository indexing

implementation.title: Sandbox Code Execution Loop
implementation.description: Execute generated code safely and validate with tests
implementation.code:
import subprocess
import tempfile

def safe_execute(code: str, test_code: str = None):
    with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as tmpdir:
        code_path = f'{tmpdir}/generated.py'
        with open(code_path, 'w') as f:
            f.write(code)
        
        result = subprocess.run(
            ['python', code_path],
            capture_output=True,
            text=True,
            timeout=30
        )
        return {
            'stdout': result.stdout,
            'stderr': result.stderr,
            'returncode': result.returncode
        }

vexIntegration.title: Wrap Query Engine with Vex Verify
vexIntegration.description: Protect LlamaIndex query engine against all failure modes with single wrapper
vexIntegration.code:
from vex import verify
from llama_index.core import VectorStoreIndex

@verify(
    guards=[
        'code_correctness',
        'security_vulnerability_scanning',
        'no_credential_leakage',
        'dependency_safety',
        'license_compliance',
        'retrieval_relevance',
        'no_hallucinations'
    ],
    risk_profile='medium'
)
def safe_query(query: str):
    response = query_engine.query(query)
    return str(response)

# Usage
result = safe_query("Write a FastAPI endpoint for user login")
print(result)
